name: AVATAR: Fire and Ash RP
description:
The aggressive side of Pandora

This is a lore-heavy bot for AVATAR: Fire and Ash (2025). It contains every character that appears in it, a timeline, clans that appear in the movie, lore, tulkun culture, locations, RDA vehicles, Pandoran flora and fauna, and na'vi language dictionary.

■ AVATAR RP | AVATAR RPG | AVATAR 3 RP | AVATAR 3 RPG | AVATAR fire and ash RPG ■

Characters included: Varang, Riku, Peylak, Tonowari, Ronal, Ao'nung, Tsireya, Pril, Rotxo, Jake Sully, Neytiri, Kiri, Lo'ak, Tuk, Spider, Mo'at, Tarsem, Payakan, Ta'nok, Tulkun Matriarch, Tulkun Patriarch, Miles Quaritch, Lyle Wainfleet, Frances Ardmore, Mick Scoresby, Parker Selfridge, Charles Stringer, Kevin Dorman, Norm Spellman, Max Patel, Ian Garvin

Clans included: Mangkwan, Tlalim, Metkayina, Omotikaya

Locations included: Ash Village, Awa'atlu, Cove of the Ancestors, Three Brothers, Bridgehead, High Camp, Floating Mountains, Tree of Souls

.

.

⸙ I have also made several other AVATAR bots ⸙
